reconciliation_id: # Purpose: Comprehensive reconciliation formulas for all FR Y-9C schedules
# SECTION 1: BALANCE SHEET CORE RECONCILIATIONS (15 formulas)

notes: Total Assets must equal sum of all asset line items
Total Liabilities must equal sum of all liability line items
Total Equity must equal sum of equity components
Total L+MI+E must equal sum of liabilities + minority + equity
Total Assets MUST equal Total Liabilities + Minority + Equity
Cash = Noninterest-bearing + Interest-bearing
Fed funds = Fed funds sold + Resale agreements
Intangibles = Goodwill + Other intangibles
Deposits = Domestic + Foreign deposits
Domestic deposits = Noninterest + Interest-bearing
Foreign deposits = Noninterest + Interest-bearing
Fed funds purchased = FF purchased + Repos
Securities = HTM + AFS (+ Equity securities)
Net loans on HC must equal HC-C total
Gross loans less unearned income

reconciliation_id: # SECTION 2: SECURITIES RECONCILIATIONS - HC to HC-B (8 formulas)

formula: HC.2.a = HC-B.8 Column C (HTM amortized cost)
notes: HTM securities must tie to HC-B total

formula: HC.2.b = HC-B.8 Column B (AFS fair value)
notes: AFS securities must tie to HC-B total

formula: HC-B.8 Col B = Sum(Items 1-7 AFS Fair Value)
notes: AFS total = sum of AFS components

formula: HC-B.8 Col C = Sum(Items 1-7 HTM Amortized Cost)
notes: HTM total = sum of HTM components
ABS total = sum of ABS types
Equity securities = Mutual funds + Other
Equity securities tie between HC and HC-B

formula: MBS Total = Sum(RMBS + CMBS all types)
notes: Total MBS = all residential + commercial MBS

reconciliation_id: # SECTION 3: LOANS RECONCILIATIONS - HC to HC-C (10 formulas)

notes: Loans net of unearned income tie to HC-C
ALLL must tie between HC and HC-C
Net loans = gross - unearned - allowance
RE loans = all RE subcategories
Construction = 1-4 family + Other construction
1-4 family = First liens + Junior liens
Nonfarm nonres = Owner-occ + Non-owner
C&I loans = Domestic + Foreign addressees
Consumer loans = CC + Revolving + Auto + Other
Leases = Individual + Other leases

reconciliation_id: # SECTION 4: TRADING RECONCILIATIONS - HC to HC-D to HC-L (8 formulas)

notes: Trading assets must tie HC to HC-D
Trading liabilities must tie HC to HC-D
Trading assets total = sum of components
Trading liabilities = Short positions + Deriv neg FV

formula: HC-D.11 = Sum(HC-L Trading + NonTrading Positive FV)
notes: Derivatives positive FV must reconcile to HC-L

formula: HC-D.14 = Sum(HC-L Trading + NonTrading Negative FV)
notes: Derivatives negative FV must reconcile to HC-L

formula: MBS Trading = K197 + K198 + K199 + K200 + K201
notes: Trading MBS total = all MBS trading types

formula: Short Positions = All short position components
notes: Short positions = securities + other shorts

reconciliation_id: # SECTION 5: CAPITAL RECONCILIATIONS - HC-R Components (12 formulas)

formula: CET1 = CET1 Before Adjustments - CET1 Deductions
notes: CET1 capital = gross CET1 - deductions
CET1 before deductions = sum of components
CET1 deductions = sum of all deduction items
Tier 1 capital = CET1 + AT1

formula: Additional Tier 1 = AT1 instruments + MI - deductions
notes: AT1 = instruments + minority - deductions
Total capital = Tier 1 + Tier 2

formula: Tier 2 = T2 instruments + MI + ACL - deductions
notes: T2 = instruments + minority + allowance - deductions
Total RWA = sum of all risk-weighted categories

formula: CET1 Ratio = CET1 Capital / Total RWA
notes: CET1 ratio calculation

formula: Tier 1 Ratio = Tier 1 Capital / Total RWA
notes: Tier 1 ratio calculation

formula: Total Capital Ratio = Total Capital / Total RWA
notes: Total capital ratio calculation

formula: Leverage Ratio = Tier 1 / Average Total Assets
notes: Leverage ratio calculation

reconciliation_id: # SECTION 6: INCOME STATEMENT RECONCILIATIONS - HI (10 formulas)

formula: Net Interest Income = Interest Income - Interest Expense
notes: NII calculation

formula: Interest Income = Sum(all interest income components)
notes: Total interest income = sum of sources

formula: Interest Expense = Sum(all interest expense components)
notes: Total interest expense = sum of sources
Total noninterest income = sum of sources
Total noninterest expense = sum of sources

formula: Income Before Securities/Tax = NII - Provision + NonII - NonIE
notes: Pre-tax pre-securities income

formula: Net Income = Pre-tax income + gains - tax - discontinued
notes: Net income calculation
Return on assets
Return on equity
Net interest margin
Other assets must tie HC to HC-F
Other assets = sum of HC-F components
Other liabilities must tie HC to HC-G
Other liabilities = sum of HC-G components
Intangibles = Goodwill + Other intangibles

reconciliation_id: # SECTION 8: DERIVATIVES RECONCILIATIONS - HC-L Detail (7 formulas)

formula: Trading Positive FV = Sum(IR + FX + Equity + Commodity)
notes: Trading positive FV by asset class

formula: Trading Negative FV = Sum(IR + FX + Equity + Commodity)
notes: Trading negative FV by asset class

formula: NonTrading Positive FV = Sum(IR + FX + Equity + Commodity)
notes: Non-trading positive FV by asset class

formula: NonTrading Negative FV = Sum(IR + FX + Equity + Commodity)
notes: Non-trading negative FV by asset class
Net credit derivatives exposure

formula: CDS Sold Total = CDS + TRS + Other sold
notes: Total credit protection sold

formula: CDS Bought Total = CDS + TRS + Other bought
notes: Total credit protection bought

reconciliation_id: # SECTION 9: CROSS-FORM RECONCILIATIONS - Y-9C to Call Report (5 formulas)

formula: Y-9C HC.12 reconciles to sum of subsidiary Call Report RC.12
notes: Consolidated assets = sum of subsidiary banks (with eliminations)

formula: Y-9C Trading Assets should approximate Call Report RC.5
notes: Trading assets consolidation check

formula: Y-9C CET1 should be consistent with bank-level CET1
notes: Capital consistency check

formula: Y-9C Net Income should consolidate from bank net income
notes: Net income consolidation check

formula: Derivatives notional should reconcile between forms
notes: Derivatives notional consistency
